creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Wed May  1 23:15:14 2013
New Revision: 317061
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317061

Log:
  - Update to 10.0.0

Modified:

Modified: head/converters/p5-bsdconv/Makefile

+++ head/converters/p5-bsdconv/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:15:14 2013	(r317061)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	bsdconv
-PORTVERSION=	9.0
+PORTVERSION=	10.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	converters perl5
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	${GH_ACCOUNT}-${GH_PROJECT}-${PORTVERSION}-0-g${GH_COMMIT}
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	bsdconv:${PORTSDIR}/convert
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	buganini
+GH_COMMIT=	092d398
 GH_PROJECT=	perl-${PORTNAME}
-GH_COMMIT=	c98a201
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
